attributes.description: Alerts when persistent or ephemeral storage free drops below 5 GB. Persistence / logs will fail.
attributes.name: [Redis Enterprise OTel] Node storage running low

investigation_guide.blob:
## Redis Enterprise node storage running low

### What fired
Persistent or ephemeral storage free dropped below 5 GB during the window.

### Why it matters
Persistent storage holds RDB/AOF; exhaustion breaks durability. Ephemeral storage holds temp files and logs.

### Triage
1. Inspect which volume is saturated.

### Remediation
- Grow the volume / archive old data.

### Tuning
- 5 GB threshold; tune to node capacity.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-redisenterprise.otel-default
| WHERE node_persistent_storage_avail IS NOT NULL
    OR node_ephemeral_storage_avail IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    avg_persistent = AVG(node_persistent_storage_avail),
    avg_ephemeral = AVG(node_ephemeral_storage_avail)
  BY node, cluster
| EVAL persistent_gb = ROUND(avg_persistent / 1073741824, 2)
| EVAL ephemeral_gb = ROUND(avg_ephemeral / 1073741824, 2)
// Alert when available storage drops below 5 GB on either volume
// Persistent storage holds AOF/RDB snapshots; exhaustion prevents persistence
// Ephemeral storage holds temp files and logs; exhaustion can crash processes
// Adjust thresholds based on your node's total disk capacity
| WHERE (persistent_gb IS NOT NULL AND persistent_gb < 5)
    OR (ephemeral_gb IS NOT NULL AND ephemeral_gb < 5)
| SORT persistent_gb ASC
